title: Chewy Trio Chicken Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry dish made with chewy trio and chicken, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add chewy trio to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add soy sauce, garlic, and green onions to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
